rationale: Educ. Code §28.025 governs high school diploma, curriculum, and endorsement requirements. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The State Board of Education by rule shall determine curriculum requirements for the foundation high school program that are consistent with the required curriculum under Section 28.002.
_note: Rule text concerns education curriculum and graduation requirements; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
